---
title: "Research"
---

under construction

<!-- ## Research Interests -->
<!-- **Political Science**: Political Behavior, Elections, Japanese Politics -->

<!-- **Methods**: Quantitative Methods, Survey -->

<!-- ## Works in Progress -->

<!-- - Natural Disasters and Political Corruption: Evidence from Cross-national Panel Data -->
<!-- Analysis -->

<!-- - Politician's Promotion and Vote Share in Election: Evidence from Japanese SNTV -->
